text.title: LLM-Powered Conversational UI Spec Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the llm-powered-conversational-ai methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-turn-structure
step.action: Specify user / assistant / tool turn shapes; how mixed-content (text + cards + tool-call) renders.

step.name: design-tool-surfaces
step.action: Specify which tools the LLM may call; map each tool's side-effect + reversibility.
step.decision-gate: Irreversible tools (delete, send, charge) require human confirm step in spec.

step.name: write-refusal-and-fallback-policy
step.action: Specify refusal patterns, fallback when tool fails, error rendering.

step.name: review-a11y-and-voice-parity
step.action: Screen-reader rendering of mixed-content turns; voice readback parity; transcript export.
step.decision-gate: If voice parity fails on a turn type, redesign the rendering rule.
